title: orthilia elatior
intro: Orthilia elatior, also known as tall mountain cranberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat urinary tract infections and other conditions associated with inflammation. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Orthilia elatior can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote urinary tract health and prevent infections.
